results.title: Nordiska Kök | LinkedIn
results.content:
Overview:
We create our bespoke kitchens in the legacy of timeless Scandinavian design. Each kitchen is locally produced in our carpentry studio outside of Gothenburg, where all our kitchens are built entirely from scratch based on our customer’s needs and wishes. All of our kitchens are available in any NCS color and a variety of different materials. Each cabinet and drawer is then specifically tailored in size and design to create that unique bespoke aesthetic for your kitchen space. We take you through the entire design process to create your very own dream kitchen — a kitchen you can live in for a long time to come, but also a space built around your conscious choices and your own individualized needs. Best of all, it’s not as expensive as you think. OUR VISION - THE DIGITAL KITCHEN COMPANY Many traditional kitchen companies still rely on a business model based on physical locations; we’ve taken a different route, one inspired by the revolution of e-commerce and digital transformation. We’ve created a comprehensive kitchen contact where everything takes place digitally, all the way from initial inspiration to your final order. Since we don’t use retailers, schedule home visits, or have to staff big showrooms all over the countries, we’re able to keep prices down and offer a completely unique, fully bespoke and entirely customized kitchen — all at the same price as a mass-produced standard kitchens of our competitors. Read more about how to build your dream kitchen with us here.

results.title: The Design process - Nordiska Kök
results.content: One of our kitchen designers will guide you through every step—from the first idea to the finished kitchen—tailored to your needs. In the next step, a digital start-up meeting is scheduled with one of our experienced kitchen designers. Together with your kitchen designer, the kitchen is planned down to the smallest detail — from design, functionality and options to any additional requests such as bathroom furnishings, storage or other custom carpentry details. Once this is approved by you, your kitchen designer places the order, and your kitchen is built in our carpentry studio in Gräfsnäs, outside Gothenburg, Sweden. ### About our kitchens. With a genuine dedication to craftsmanship—where every cabinet and drawer is tailored in size, colour and material—the result is a kitchen that is unique in both design and quality, yet still accessible and rooted in conscious choices. With a genuine dedication to craftsmanship—where every cabinet and drawer is tailored in size, colour and material—the result is a kitchen that is unique in both design and quality, yet still accessible and rooted in conscious choices.
